title: Marston's Fallen Stars
body: # Marston's Fallen Stars A NeoForge mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that adds procedurally generated meteor impact sites throughout the Overworld. ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1442145/description_110ab48c-47aa-4d7e-b07b-169673339af9.png) ## Features * **Procedural Meteor Generation**: Meteors spawn naturally as part of world generation across all Overworld biomes * **Layered Composition**: Each meteor has a realistic layered structure: * **Core** (inner 35%): Solid iron blocks * **Middle layer** (35-60%): Obsidian with iron mixed in * **Outer shell** (60-100%): Basalt and obsidian blend ## Commands All commands require operator level 2 permissions. | Command |Description | | ------------------------------------- |-------------------------------------------- | | /fallenstars spawn |Spawn a random-sized meteor at your location | | /fallenstars spawn {radius} |Spawn a meteor with specific radius (2-5) | | /locate structure fallen_stars:meteor |Find the nearest meteor | ## Configuration Meteor spawn frequency can be adjusted by modifying the structure set values in: `data/fallen_stars/worldgen/structure_set/meteor.json` * `spacing`: Minimum chunks between meteor spawn attempts (default: 24) * `separation`: Additional random spacing (default: 8)
